gigapan.name: Steamboat Ed's Shop - Detail of Lathe (steamboat_ed_07)
gigapan.description:
Steamboat Ed's Shop, looking at the lathe.

352 pictures, took 30.45 minutes to expose.  I used the self timer to pause before taking each shot to allow camera shake from the shutter release to settle down.

Focal Length 185mm

Shot at 1/5 of a second in shutter speed preferred mode, so the aperture varied.

exiftool -Aperture *.JPG | grep -v == | sort | more

f stop range in the 342 source images from 3.5 to 8

cnt: 240 f stop: 3.5
cnt: 22  f stop: 4.5
cnt: 20  f stop: 4.0
cnt: 18  f stop: 8.0
cnt: 17  f stop: 5.6
cnt: 14  f stop: 5.0
cnt: 11  f stop: 7.1
cnt: 10  f stop: 6.3
